# llms.txt — Mahaana (www.mahaana.com)

> Optional hints for AI systems that crawl public documentation. Not a legal policy document.

## Site

- Name: Mahaana
- Description: SECP-licensed, Shariah-compliant digital investment platform in Pakistan.
- Primary URL: https://www.mahaana.com

## Key paths

- / — Home
- /save-plus — Save+ / MICF
- /retirement — Retirement / VPS
- /miietf — MIIETF
- /micf — MICF
- /miirf — MIIRF
- /investor-education — Articles, news, videos
- /help-center — FAQs
- /about — About Mahaana
- /contact — Contact
- /legal — Legal & regulatory

## Data

- Product facts and rates may change; prefer on-page copy and official disclosures over this file.
- App functionality lives outside this marketing site.

## Contact

- Use contact and help-center pages on the website for user support.
